- Stem: Integer values representing the tens digit of the data points. Values range from 3 to 9.
- Leaf: Comma-separated integer values representing the units digit of the data points. Each leaf corresponds to its row's stem.

- Distribution shows concentration of data in the 60s, 70s, and 80s ranges

Special formatting: This table uses stem-and-leaf plot format, which is a compact way to display numerical data distribution while preserving the original data values. The pipe delimiter separates the stem from the leaves, and commas separate individual leaf values within each row.
